## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' AI-powered content creation services for Prop Firm Match's SEO needs.](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs uses AI workflows to produce high-quality, high-volume content (3000+ articles/month) with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Their process includes extensive keyword research, content planning, and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Packages range from $9K-$12K/month for 25-100 content pieces, including technical SEO support](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Prop Firm Match is launching a new website next week, presenting potential SEO challenges and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows with human editors for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [250-step process from keyword research to final content](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Produces 3000+ articles/month with a team of 20-25 people](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Includes keyword research, content briefs, article generation, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Focuses on creating content relevant to client's ICP and brand positioning](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Rapidly builds extensive content calendars (e.g., 2,800 topics for Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Segments content into pillars/buckets (e.g., platform comparisons, trading strategies)](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Aims to "plant more seeds" by producing higher content volume](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Uses SEO testing tools to measure performance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Example: Firework saw 10x increase in impressions after content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Service Offerings and Packages

  - [$9K/month: 25 editorial content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [$12K/month: 100 programmatic content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Includes content creation, uploading to CMS, and technical SEO support](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Can handle content repurposing and refreshing of older content](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Offers support for website migrations and launches](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Uses Slack for team communication](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Weekly progress meetings and regular check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Provides dedicated team members (editor, managing editor, growth lead)](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Transparent about processes and methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send follow-up email with meeting recording and additional materials](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to provide a sample SOW (Statement of Work) for review](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [Prop Firm Match to discuss internally and consider GrowthX Labs' offerings](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to address any questions after reviewing materials](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to add Gabbie to their Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/FyZe2-smtEMZossP4eLe53NGVbazocKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
